title: Todo List App

statement.markdown:
markdown: ## Todo List App

Create a todo list app with the following features:

### Requirements

1. User can add new tasks to the list
2. User can mark tasks as completed
3. User can delete tasks from the list
4. Task list is persisted across page reloads
5. User can filter tasks by completion status
6. User can clear completed tasks

### Additional Requirements

* Task list should be sorted by task name when user adds a new task
* User should be able to edit task names and details
* Task list should display the number of completed tasks

constraints:
The task list should be persisted in local storage.
The user should be able to add, edit, delete tasks from the list.
Tasks should be sorted alphabetically by name.
Task completion status should be persisted across page reloads.
